name: route_inference
description: Route an autonomous agent task to a capable model, enforce Cobo Agentic Wallet spend policy, execute live inference, and return an answer with wallet/payment receipt.

prompt.description: Task prompt from the autonomous agent or user.

routing_mode.description: Routing preference applied after capability filtering.

max_spend_usd.description: Per-task inference spend cap enforced by CoboRouter and Cobo wallet policy.

allowed_providers.description: Agent-side provider allowlist. Supported Z.AI provider IDs include zai, zai_glm_5_turbo, zai_glm_5, zai_glm_4_7, zai_flash, zai_glm_4_7_flashx, zai_glm_4_6, zai_glm_4_5, zai_glm_4_5_air, zai_glm_4_5_x, zai_glm_4_5_airx, zai_glm_4_5_flash, and zai_glm_4_32b_128k.

require_receipt.description: When true, persist a receipt JSON file and include receipt paths in the response.

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied replay key for agent/payment idempotency.

edge_case_proofs.simple_zai: selected_provider=zai_flash, selected_model=glm-4.7-flash, provider_invoice.simulated=false with ZAI_API_KEY, payment.status=not_created
